# Den Ree

Building apps that help you stay creative. Tech founder and musician exploring the creative potentials of code.

## Summary

Den Ree is a personal site for a tech founder and musician. It showcases apps (Content Office, Tapelet), music and live-coded performances, tech/development work, and a journal. Target audience: people interested in creative tech, app development, and code-driven music.

## Main sections

- [Home](https://denree.nl/): Apps, music preview, and intro
- [Tech](https://denree.nl/tech): Mobile app development, sprint validation, MVP builds, iOS/Flutter/backend
- [Music](https://denree.nl/music): Code-driven DJ sets, live-coded music, algorithmic composition
- [Journal](https://denree.nl/journal): Thoughts on building products, creative coding, staying creative
- [Contact](https://denree.nl/contact): Get in touch for app ideas, music projects, or general inquiry

## Apps

- Content Office: Instagram planner app for creators
- Tapelet: Multi-channel audio recording app (Beta)

## Contact

- [Contact page](https://denree.nl/contact)
